mapper.select:
SELECT si.* ,dst.security_type_name FROM rrs_securityinfo si LEFT JOIN dict_security_type dst ON dst.security_type = si.security_type AND dst.is_deleted = 0
AND si.security_type NOT IN ('crmw', 'company') AND si.security_status != 'D'
AND si.wind_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{securityCode}, '%')
AND si.short_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{securityShortName}, '%')
AND si.issuer LIKE CONCAT('%', #{issuer}, '%')
ORDER BY si.ts DESC ,si.wind_code DESC

SELECT al.id ,al.security_code ,al.adjust_type ,al.adjust_mode ,al.adjust_batch_no ,al.target_pool_id ,al.flow_id ,al.flow_key ,al.audit_status ,al.adjuster_id ,al.adjust_reason ,al.adjust_advice ,al.submit_time FROM ip_adjust_log al INNER JOIN ( SELECT CASE WHEN CHAR_LENGTH(adjust_batch_no) >= 25 THEN LEFT(adjust_batch_no, 21) ELSE LEFT(adjust_batch_no, 18) END AS batch_prefix FROM ip_adjust_log WHERE adjuster_id = #{adjusterId} AND adjust_type = '手动批量调整' AND audit_status NOT IN ('-1', '99') AND is_deleted = 0 AND submit_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{seconds} SECOND) ORDER BY submit_time DESC ,id DESC LIMIT 1 ) latest ON CASE WHEN CHAR_LENGTH(al.adjust_batch_no) >= 25 THEN LEFT(al.adjust_batch_no, 21) ELSE LEFT(al.adjust_batch_no, 18) END = latest.batch_prefix WHERE al.adjuster_id = #{adjusterId} AND al.adjust_type = '手动批量调整' AND al.audit_status NOT IN ('-1', '99') AND al.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY al.security_code ASC ,al.target_pool_id ASC ,al.id ASC

SELECT id ,security_code ,adjust_type ,adjust_mode ,adjust_batch_no ,target_pool_id ,flow_id ,flow_key ,audit_status ,adjuster_id ,adjust_reason ,adjust_advice ,submit_time FROM ip_adjust_log WHERE security_code = #{securityCode} AND adjuster_id = #{adjusterId} AND adjust_type = '手工调整' AND audit_status NOT IN ('-1', '99') AND is_deleted = 0 AND submit_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{seconds} SECOND) ORDER BY submit_time DESC ,id DESC

SELECT DISTINCT occupied.target_pool_id FROM ip_adjust_log manual_log INNER JOIN ip_adjust_step pending_step ON pending_step.adjust_batch_no = manual_log.adjust_batch_no AND pending_step.step_status = 'pending' INNER JOIN ip_adjust_log occupied ON occupied.adjust_batch_no = manual_log.adjust_batch_no AND occupied.audit_status IN ('00', '11') AND occupied.is_deleted = 0 WHERE manual_log.security_code = #{securityCode} AND manual_log.adjust_type IN ('手工调整', '手动批量调整') AND manual_log.audit_status IN ('00', '11') AND manual_log.is_deleted = 0
AND manual_log.adjust_batch_no != #{excludeBatchNo}
SELECT si.* ,dst.security_type_name FROM rrs_securityinfo si LEFT JOIN dict_security_type dst ON dst.security_type = si.security_type AND dst.is_deleted = 0 WHERE si.wind_code = #{securityCode}

SELECT ips.target_pool_id ,p.pool_name ,ips.pool_type ,ips.adjust_batch_no ,ips.adjust_log_id ,DATE_FORMAT(ips.entry_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS entryDate FROM ip_pool_status ips INNER JOIN ip_investment_pool p ON p.id = ips.target_pool_id AND p.is_deleted = 0 WHERE ips.security_code = #{securityCode} AND ips.audit_status = '20' AND ips.is_deleted = 0 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ip_investment_pool child WHERE child.parent_id = p.id AND child.is_deleted = 0 )

SELECT ips.target_pool_id ,p.pool_name ,ips.pool_type ,MAX(ips.adjust_batch_no) AS adjustBatchNo ,DATE_FORMAT(MIN(ips.entry_time), '%Y-%m-%d') AS entryDate ,COUNT(DISTINCT ips.security_code) AS bondCount FROM ip_pool_status ips INNER JOIN rrs_securityinfo sb ON ips.security_code = sb.wind_code INNER JOIN ip_investment_pool p ON p.id = ips.target_pool_id AND p.is_deleted = 0 WHERE sb.issuer = ( SELECT issuer FROM rrs_securityinfo WHERE wind_code = #{securityCode} LIMIT 1 ) AND ips.audit_status = '20' AND ips.is_deleted = 0 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ip_investment_pool child WHERE child.parent_id = p.id AND child.is_deleted = 0 ) GROUP BY p.id ,ips.target_pool_id ,p.pool_name ,ips.pool_type

SELECT al.id ,al.security_code ,al.security_short_name ,al.security_type ,al.adjust_type ,al.adjust_mode ,al.adjust_batch_no ,al.target_pool_id ,al.target_pool_name ,al.pool_type ,al.flow_id ,al.flow_key ,al.flow_type ,fd.name AS flowName ,al.audit_status ,al.adjuster_id ,al.adjuster_name ,al.adjust_reason ,al.adjust_advice ,al.submit_time ,al.audit_time ,al.entry_time FROM ip_adjust_log al LEFT JOIN wf_flow_definition fd ON fd.id = al.flow_id WHERE al.is_deleted = 0
AND al.adjust_batch_no = #{adjustBatchNo}
AND al.security_code = #{securityCode} AND al.audit_status NOT IN ('-1', '20', '21', '99')
ORDER BY al.crte_time DESC
SELECT DISTINCT target_pool_id FROM ip_pool_status WHERE security_code = #{securityCode} AND audit_status = '20' AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT security_code) FROM ip_pool_status WHERE target_pool_id = #{poolId} AND audit_status = '20' AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT COALESCE(ips.entry_time, al.audit_time, ips.crte_time) FROM ip_pool_status ips LEFT JOIN ip_adjust_log al ON al.id = ips.adjust_log_id WHERE ips.security_code = #{securityCode} AND ips.target_pool_id = #{targetPoolId} AND ips.audit_status = '20' AND ips.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT target_pool_id AS id ,COUNT(DISTINCT security_code) AS currentCount FROM ip_pool_status WHERE audit_status = '20' AND is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY target_pool_id

SELECT COUNT(1) > 0 FROM ip_adjust_log al INNER JOIN ip_adjust_step s ON s.adjust_batch_no = al.adjust_batch_no WHERE al.security_code = #{securityCode} AND al.is_deleted = 0 AND s.step_status = 'pending'

SELECT s.node_label FROM ip_adjust_log al INNER JOIN ip_adjust_step s ON s.adjust_batch_no = al.adjust_batch_no WHERE al.security_code = #{securityCode} AND al.is_deleted = 0 AND s.step_status = 'pending' ORDER BY s.sort_order ASC ,s.id ASC ,al.submit_time DESC ,al.id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(1) > 0 FROM ip_pool_status ips INNER JOIN ip_investment_pool p ON p.id = ips.target_pool_id AND p.is_deleted = 0 WHERE ips.security_code = #{securityCode} AND p.pool_type = 'observe' AND ips.audit_status = '20' AND ips.is_deleted = 0

SELECT COUNT(1) > 0 FROM ip_pool_status ips INNER JOIN ip_investment_pool p ON p.id = ips.target_pool_id AND p.is_deleted = 0 WHERE ips.security_code = #{securityCode} AND p.pool_type IN ('forbidden', 'blacklist') AND ips.audit_status = '20' AND ips.is_deleted = 0

SELECT COUNT(1) > 0 FROM ip_pool_status ips INNER JOIN rrs_securityinfo si ON si.wind_code = ips.security_code INNER JOIN ip_investment_pool p ON p.id = ips.target_pool_id AND p.is_deleted = 0 WHERE si.issuer = ( SELECT issuer FROM rrs_securityinfo WHERE wind_code = #{securityCode} LIMIT 1 ) AND p.pool_type = 'observe' AND ips.audit_status = '20' AND ips.is_deleted = 0

SELECT MAX(DATEDIFF(STR_TO_DATE(si.date_next, '%Y%m%d'), CURDATE())) FROM ip_pool_status ips INNER JOIN rrs_securityinfo si ON si.wind_code = ips.security_code WHERE si.issuer = ( SELECT issuer FROM rrs_securityinfo WHERE wind_code = #{securityCode} LIMIT 1 ) AND ips.target_pool_id = #{targetPoolId} AND ips.audit_status = '20' AND ips.is_deleted = 0 AND si.date_next REGEXP '^[0-9]{8}$'

SELECT COUNT(1) > 0 FROM ip_adjust_log l WHERE l.audit_status = '20' AND l.adjust_mode = '调入' AND l.is_deleted = 0 AND l.crte_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH) AND l.security_code IN ( SELECT si.wind_code FROM rrs_securityinfo si WHERE si.issuer = (SELECT issuer FROM rrs_securityinfo WHERE wind_code = #{securityCode} LIMIT 1) ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sys_attachment a WHERE a.table_name = 'ip_adjust_log' AND a.main_id = l.id AND a.is_deleted = 0 AND a.attachment_category IN ('credit_report_hand', 'credit_report_in', 'credit_report_out') )

SELECT COUNT(1) > 0 FROM ip_pool_status ips INNER JOIN rrs_securityinfo si ON si.wind_code = ips.security_code WHERE si.issuer = ( SELECT issuer FROM rrs_securityinfo WHERE wind_code = #{securityCode} LIMIT 1 ) AND ips.target_pool_id = #{targetPoolId} AND ips.flow_type != 'simpleInbound' AND ips.audit_status = '20' AND ips.is_deleted = 0 AND ips.entry_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)
mapper.update: UPDATE ip_pool_status SET is_deleted = 1 ,updt_time = NOW() WHERE security_code = #{securityCode} AND target_pool_id = #{targetPoolId} AND audit_status = '20' AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT id ,adjust_log_id ,adjust_batch_no ,flow_node_id ,node_code ,node_label ,node_type ,approval_strategy ,sort_order ,step_status ,handler_id ,handler_name ,process_action ,process_comment ,start_time ,process_time FROM ip_adjust_step WHERE adjust_log_id = #{adjustLogId} ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT id ,adjust_log_id ,adjust_batch_no ,flow_node_id ,node_code ,node_label ,node_type ,approval_strategy ,sort_order ,step_status ,handler_id ,handler_name ,process_action ,process_comment ,start_time ,process_time FROM ip_adjust_step WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT pool_id ,relation_type ,relation_pool_id FROM ip_pool_relation WHERE is_deleted = 0
SELECT category_type FROM dict_security_type WHERE security_type = #{securityType} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
